title: Write Workbook (containg two worksheets) in CSV file
author: jcabannes

comments.author: MaksimKlepikov
comments.body:
+1 
Same on .xlsx.writeBuffer()
All worksheets persist in workbook, but file contain only one

Ok, looks like they just hidden. Related to #630 
And i dont know how to fix it. `worksheet.state = 'show';` dont work

comments.author: FabioMFGaspar
comments.body:
This issue is still happening.
When creating more than 1 worksheet with csv only the 1st one is actually added

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
All inactive issues were closed.

About CSV, I can't imagine how it should work for many spreadsheets - csv is just simple file without features like spreadsheets. Taking only one seems be reasonable.

If you don't mind please describe what do you expect as a result?

comments.author: nhuanhoangduc
comments.body: Solution is creating a cloned workbook
